description: When the same Arc III outlier field(s) persist for N+ consecutive rounds AND listening verdict stays legendary AND HCI stays within 1 point of historical, the composition has genuinely entered a new regime. Action: update envelope to recent-only snapshots instead of correcting the state. Distinguishes regime shift (accept) from drift-toward-failure (correct).

trigger.check: python3 -c "import json, os; p='metrics/hme-arc-timeseries.jsonl'; d=json.load(open('metrics/hme-legendary-drift.json')) if os.path.isfile('metrics/hme-legendary-drift.json') else {}; rows=[json.loads(l) for l in open(p)] if os.path.isfile(p) else []; tail=rows[-3:]; top_outlier=(d.get('outliers') or [{}])[0].get('field'); hci_stable=len(tail)>=3 and all(isinstance(r.get('arc_iii',{}).get('top_outlier_field'),str) and r['arc_iii']['top_outlier_field']==top_outlier for r in tail); print(f'regime shift accepted: {top_outlier} persisted 3+ rounds, verdict legendary — envelope update recommended') if hci_stable and top_outlier else None"
trigger.matches_when: same top outlier field for 3+ consecutive rounds while verdict remains legendary

action.summary: Accept regime shift — update Arc III envelope to recent-only snapshots.
steps: Confirm HCI has been ≥95 across the persistent-drift window.
Log the epoch transition in metrics/hme-epoch-transitions.jsonl with timestamp + reason (auto-applied).
Exponential weighting in compute-legendary-drift.py already adapts the envelope; auto-apply verifies decay coefficient is tuned (R25: 0.7).
Verify next pipeline's drift score drops toward 0 as envelope adapts.

history.note: First application of the pattern; follow-up rounds should auto-apply
